utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I ... I hurt three huge men , I gave a guy a bloody nose ... I mean I ... I am not proud of it but , I really am .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I ... I hurt three huge men , I gave a guy a bloody nose

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And it is all because of you , wonderful , amazing you .

emotion_cause.span: 4_And it is all because of you , wonderful , amazing you .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: I think you have got concussion .

emotion_cause.span: 4_it is all because of you , wonderful , amazing you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , no , I am serious . Thank you .

emotion_cause.span: 4_And it is all because of you , wonderful , amazing you .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: You are welcome . I am sorry . Did I hurt you ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is worth the pain . You know what , you know what ? It is not .
